---
title: I am ...
---
<!-- <div class="card"> -->

- **self-aware**
- anxious
- paradoxical
- cat person
- shut-in
- christian
- chronically online
- attention seeker
- introvert
- emotionally inept
- socially awkward
- unable to see well without glasses
- obsessive
- underweight
- bad at conversation
- lazy
- understanding
- smart and stupid
- hopeless romantic
- overthinker
- neurotic
- nosy
- delusional
- cringe
- allergic to emotional manipulation
- dealing with mental health issues

<!-- </div> -->

        /* display: flex; */

            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
        }
    }

        background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');
